title: Loader
description: Circular spinner for indicating indeterminate progress. Small, accessible, and inherits color by default so it integrates into buttons, banners or any container.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: normal shows only the arc; outline adds a subtle background track.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes aligned with the rest of the system (14, 18 and 22 px).

colors.title: Custom colors
colors.desc: The color prop accepts any CSS value — useful for applying project semantic tokens.

inline.title: Inline with text
inline.desc: Combined with text, the spinner inherits the container's color by default.

props.variant: Visual variant. outline paints a subtle background track on the ring.
props.color: Stroke color. Accepts any valid CSS value.
props.label: Visually hidden accessible text for screen readers.
